title: dianthus elatus
intro: Dianthus elatus, also known as the Chinese pink or fragrant pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dianthus elatus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. Dianthus elatus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, infusion, and tincture, for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
